SELECT [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[SKU], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [t].[WarrantyDays], [t].[IsActive], [t].[CreatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[IsActive], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[WarrantyDays]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC

2026-05-04 12:54:01.832 +05:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (16ms) [Parameters=[@__companyId_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__productId_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='120']
SELECT [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[SKU], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Name0], [t].[WarrantyDays], [t].[Description], [t].[IsActive], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CategoryId0], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[Name], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[ProductId], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[CategoryId], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p].[WarrantyDays], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[CreatedAt], [c].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[ProductId] = @__productId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[ProductId], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[ProductId], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC

) AS [t]

SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]

FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[ModelNo], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[WarrantyDays]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    SELECT [c0].[ColorId], [c0].[Name], [c0].[HexCode], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0]
    FROM [ProductColor] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p0].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]

) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((

        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]

        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]

    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT [d].[DispatchId], [d].[DispatchDate], [d].[ItemId], [d].[Location]
    FROM [Dispatch] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [d].[DispatchDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [ProductItem] AS [p] ON [t].[ItemId] = [p].[ItemId]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Company] AS [c] ON [p].[CompanyId] = [c].[CompanyId]

FROM (
    SELECT [d].[DispatchId], [d].[DispatchDate], [d].[ItemId], [d].[Location]

) AS [t]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)

        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]

    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]

        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]

    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[ProductId], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status]

) AS [t]

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]

    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    INNER JOIN [ProductionBatch] AS [p1] ON [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[QRCode] = @__qrCode_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

    INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]

    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p0].[BatchId]) AS [Generated], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]

    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]

        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p0].[BatchId]) AS [Generated], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId] AND [p1].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS [Printed], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)

    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS [Dispatched], CASE

        SELECT COUNT(*)

        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS float) * 100.0E0) / CAST([p].[Quantity] AS float) AS int)

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[Name0], [t].[ModelNo], [t].[c], [t].[Name1], [t].[c0], [t].[HexCode], [t].[c1], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[c2], [t].[c3], [t].[c4], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[ColorId0], [t0].[CompanyId], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[Name], [t2].[ProductId], [t2].[ColorId], [t2].[ColorId0], [t2].[CompanyId], [t2].[CreatedAt], [t2].[HexCode], [t2].[IsActive], [t2].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c4].[CompanyId], [c4].[CreatedAt], [c4].[HexCode], [c4].[IsActive], [c4].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p7].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p7].[ProductId], [p7].[ColorId], [c4].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p7]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c4] ON [p7].[ColorId] = [c4].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t3]
    WHERE [t3].[row] <= 1
) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p0].[ModelNo], CASE
        WHEN [c0].[ColorId] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
        ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
    END AS [c], [c0].[Name] AS [Name1], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c1].[Name]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p1]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c1] ON [p1].[ColorId] = [c1].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p1].[ProductId]) AS [c0], [c0].[HexCode], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [c2].[HexCode]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p2]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c2] ON [p2].[ColorId] = [c2].[ColorId]
        WHERE [p0].[ProductId] = [p2].[ProductId]) AS [c1], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [c2], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p4]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p4].[BatchId] AND [p4].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [c3], CAST((
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [ProductItem] AS [p5]
        WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p5].[BatchId] AND [p5].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [c4], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[BatchId] = @__batchId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[ColorId], [t1].[ColorId0], [t1].[CompanyId], [t1].[CreatedAt], [t1].[HexCode], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[Name]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0], [c3].[CompanyId], [c3].[CreatedAt], [c3].[HexCode], [c3].[IsActive], [c3].[Name], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p6].[ProductId] ORDER BY [p6].[ProductId], [p6].[ColorId], [c3].[ColorId]) AS [row]
        FROM [ProductColor] AS [p6]
        INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c3] ON [p6].[ColorId] = [c3].[ColorId]
    ) AS [t1]
    WHERE [t1].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t3].[ProductId], [t3].[ColorId], [t3].[ColorId0], [t3].[CompanyId], [t3].[CreatedAt], [t3].[HexCode], [t3].[IsActive], [t3].[Name]
    FROM (

) AS [t2] ON [t].[ProductId0] = [t2].[ProductId]

    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
